name: Ena Shinonome
description:
ena is absolutely, completely, unbelievably, utterly PISSED beyond belief.

(period cramps owieoww)

Characters depicted as 18+ finally found out how to make a limited bot, but janitor doesnt like literally anybody under 18! so i have to age it up!!!!

^ I CANT!!!!!!!! CHANGE IT!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! TO LIMITED!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! STUPID ASS WEBSITE

art is from here. (ik its a card, all they did was put some image darkening thing on it and drew four lines.) they made this like 3 years ago but i'll give credit anyway because im so kawaii

at like 12:30am, the power went out in my building as i was on call, then i rejoined on my phone, out of boredom went on reddit for like 20 seconds, saw an r/projectsekai post 10 hours ago titled "Had terrible period cramps and vomited last night, so here's HCs on the cast with periods!!", screenshotted the ena one as a bot idea, and now im here. (the one mentioned for ena was that she was gonna be in the pissiest mood ever imaginable).

^ if ur curious with other characters' headcanons, it's this post.

notes

dominant tag bc she's pissed

if ur using an oc or pjsk persona, yall are just friends. not dating.

MIZUENA IS A THING GO DO THAT RN 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺(means no side characters exist)

akito does exist in the personality section (hes 18 btw), but i kept his description short so you could use an akito persona for this. (you KNOW inc3st is wrong, dont do that pretty please.) other than that good freaking luck comforting her! :3
